product.title: Ruby Kisses 3D Face Creator Cream Foundation & Concealer, 12 Hours Long Lasting, Medium to Full Coverage, Non-Greasy, Ideal for Makeup & Contour Palette (Level 15)
featureBullets: ALL-DAY WEAR: Specifically formulated for 12+ hours of flawless wear makeup ensuring long-lasting confidence & a gorgeous, lightweight finish

FULL COVERAGE FORMULA: Provides full coverage that controls shine and reduces the appearance of blemishes for a flawless complexion while ensuring your skin looks fresh and flawless from morning to night
MULTI-FUNCTIONAL USE: Works as both a foundation, contour and concealer with multiple shades, offering versatility to easily sculpt and highlight your beautiful features
SEMI-MATTE FINISH: Achieve a natural, clean makeup look with the perfect “your skin but better” fresh and flawless finish
SUPER BLENDABLE: Designed to deliver a creamy texture that effortlessly blends into your skin for a smooth, seamless finish, feeling light & lasts all-day long

specification.value: Conceals Imperfections, Face, Skin, buildable coverage, full coverage, medium coverage, skin imperfections
#4,172 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #51 in Foundation Makeup
Breathable, Lightweight, Long Lasting, Travel Size

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation matches their skin perfectly and is among the best they've used, offering buildable coverage that blends seamlessly with skin and lace wigs. The product receives positive feedback for its smooth, creamy texture that goes on easily, and customers consider it worth the price.

reviews.reviewText: I was going to order #11 at first but I looked at a few videos online and they said to go 2 shades darker if you're using it for your lace wigs . I have a warm undertone on my skin but I hate that orangey look. A few girls complained about that with #11 and #12. So I jumped to #14 and believe it or not it's perfect! My wig parts look like scalp. The coverage is immaculate! And no orangey after effect. This really is some good foundation. I wish it came with a brush but you get a good amount for the price. My advice is to take your time and see what matches your skin tone by looking at some videos and the color chart Kiss shows on the pictures. It really helped me because my beauty supply store doesn't have samples out for me to try. This one was a hit and win!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 6, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Makeup so soft and color matched my skin perfectly full coverage as well 🥰
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 18, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Flawless Coverage That Lasts All Day!
reviews.reviewText: I tried Ruby Kisses 3D Face Creator Cream Foundation & Concealer, and it truly delivers on its long-lasting promise! This product has quickly become a favorite in my makeup routine because it blends beautifully and stays put for up to 12 hours. 💫 Great Coverage: It does an excellent job evening out my skin tone and concealing imperfections without looking cakey. Blemishes, redness, and dark circles all fade into a smooth, natural finish. 🎨 Buildable & Blendable: You can go from a light, everyday look to fuller coverage without the product feeling heavy. It blends easily with a sponge, brush, or fingertips — no harsh lines or patchiness. ⏱ Long-Lasting Wear: True to the claim, this foundation stays put through a busy day — no fading, settling into fine lines, or midday touch-ups required. ✨ Smooth, Natural Finish: It feels comfortable on the skin and gives a soft, radiant look that doesn’t appear overly matte or oily. 💃 Great Value: A foundation that doubles as a concealer and offers all-day performance — especially at this price point — is definitely worth it. Overall, the Ruby Kisses 3D Face Creator Cream Foundation & Concealer gives dependable coverage with a natural finish that lasts. Highly recommend if you want a reliable everyday foundation with concealer power! 💖✨
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 26, 2025

reviews.reviewText: It’s very natural and it’s an everyday foundation that enhances your complexion without a heavy look very comfortable, breathable makeup for regular wear. Great color match, ease of oiliness.A budget-conscious option that still gives a clean, polished finish.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 8, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I wasn't expecting much when I ordered this. I'm 57 and my skin has changed, so I'm always on the lookout for a good foundation. Powder types are horrible for mature skin, I haven't found a serum type I like. Liquid foundations are hit or miss. I thought for the price if it didn't work out I could give it to my daughter, who is a makeup hoarder lol Well, she didn't get this one. It's a keeper. It doesn't settle into fine lines, doesn't make my pores look like pot holes, has great coverage (not too much, not too little), is buildable, and it has a soft, beautiful finish. Using a setting spray it will stay for at least 8 hours. And you can't beat the price! I got the light/medium and the color is spot on - matches my skin color and tone perfectly (fair/medium, neutral skin tone). I use my facial oil first, then the foundation and it goes on sooo nice and looks just beautiful. I do think it might be a bit drying without the facial oil but I do have dry skin to begin with and always use my facial oil. People with normal skin probably won't have any issues. This is definitely my favorite foundation and really the only one I'm using anymore because it just looks so nice and stays so well. It's a great cream foundation!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I love this cream foundation! The coverage is medium to full and it blends very smoothly on the skin. It’s not greasy and lasts for hours without looking cakey. The shade match is great and perfect for contouring too. Definitely a good buy
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is indeed what I am looking for
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 25, 2026

reviews.reviewText: It gives a nice natural look! It’s easy to apply, and it does not stick gives a nice smooth finish, and a full coverage. The shade I chose was a wild guess as I thought the next one was too dark and it’s turned out too light for me right now as I’ve gotten darker. I think I’d love more help on how to select the right shade though as I need to repurchase
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 12, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Very good product, I received it very quickly and it works
It's a nice product i will purchase more
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Arab Emirates on June 20, 2024

reviews.reviewTitle: An essential part of my life
reviews.reviewText: I swear to God this is the holy grail!!! I use this cream foundation for my wig installations and I will never use anything else. It has such a lightweight feel so less is more when using it and very easy to apply. I have used it on wig which had Swiss lace which is normally hard as hell to blend but the foundation had great coverage and was able to blend and match the lace to my skin tone which is quite hard as a darkskin girly. Delivery was real pressure, I think I got it about 3-4 days after on standard delivery.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on June 8, 2025
